title: euphrasia minima var. drosocalyx
intro: Euphrasia minima var. drosocalyx, commonly known as the dwarf eyebright, is a small perennial plant belonging to the genus Euphrasia and family Orobanchaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Euphrasia minima var. drosocalyx include its ability to soothe and calm irritated eyes, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from eye infections to respiratory issues.
